'''vaguvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scad|scad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scad|scad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vaguvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vægivith|vægivith]] || [[word:vægivij|vægivij]] || [[word:vægivish|vægivish]] || [[word:vægivi|vægivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vaguguvuth|vaguguvuth]] || [[word:vaguguvuj|vaguguvuj]] || [[word:vaguguvush|vaguguvush]] || [[word:vaguguvu|vaguguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vaguvuth|vaguvuth]] || [[word:vaguvuj|vaguvuj]] || [[word:vaguvush|vaguvush]] || [[word:vaguvu|vaguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vagufvuth|vagufvuth]] || [[word:vagufvuj|vagufvuj]] || [[word:vagufvush|vagufvush]] || [[word:vagufvuf|vagufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vaguvuthu|vaguvuthu]] || [[word:vaguvuju|vaguvuju]] || [[word:vaguvushu|vaguvushu]] || [[word:vaguvuku|vaguvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vaguvuth|vaguvuth]] || [[word:vaguvuj|vaguvuj]] || [[word:vaguvush|vaguvush]] || [[word:vaguvu|vaguvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vaguvuthul|vaguvuthul]] || [[word:vaguvujul|vaguvujul]] || [[word:vaguvushul|vaguvushul]] || [[word:vaguvukul|vaguvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vaguvuthuthu|vaguvuthuthu]] || [[word:vaguvujuju|vaguvujuju]] || [[word:vaguvushushu|vaguvushushu]] || [[word:vaguvuku|vaguvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vaguvuthun|vaguvuthun]] || [[word:vaguvujun|vaguvujun]] || [[word:vaguvushun|vaguvushun]] || [[word:vaguvukun|vaguvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vaguvuthuoro|vaguvuthuoro]] || [[word:vaguvujuoro|vaguvujuoro]] || [[word:vaguvushuoro|vaguvushuoro]] || [[word:vaguvukuoro|vaguvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
